description: This site — a clean home for past and future projects, built with Astro and Vue.

title: The PFAS Governance Tracker
description: A Publicly available database of per- and poly- fluoroalkyl substance related governance actions.

title: OT2 Control Panel
description: A Graphical user interface for The Hendricks Labratory at Whitman College. Built to provide a simple and accessible interface for the OT2 Liquids Handler Robot.

title: Monkey Flower Annotation Model
description: A Custom trained convolutional neural network, made to annotate images of monkeyflower petals.
